calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/E. Estacio, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Joanthan Piper, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ahmad Atieh, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration on file, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the defaulted Defendant: Edward Collins.
Matter submitted and under submission, amount of Judgment to be determined after the Court review the document in file.

Feb. 9, 2005
Judgment granted in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Edward Collins as follows:
Damages $26,367.00
Costs $816.80 for a total of $27,183.80
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
